title: Accessible Video Player

statement.markdown:
## Description
Create an accessible video player that meets WCAG 2.1 guidelines.

### Requirements
1. Use semantic HTML to structure the video player.
2. Implement closed captions and provide an option to toggle them on and off.
3. Ensure that the video can be controlled using keyboard navigation.
4. Use ARIA attributes to provide screen reader support.
5. Make the video player responsive and adaptable to different screen sizes.

constraints: Code must be in a single HTML file
Use only vanilla JavaScript (no libraries or frameworks)
